executive_verdict.primary_reason: label and scope hygiene: Paper 35 v1.0 overstates several conditional or scoped surfaces, especially the baryogenesis theorem-surface status and dark-matter null forecast

results.manuscript_claim: gamma_BI = 0.2375 is the shared external LQG constant; Paper 35 uses zero continuously fitted cosmological parameters.
results.verdict: no-issue-found / imported external constant
results.evidence: gamma_BI predates Paper 35 and moves many unrelated framework predictions simultaneously; no Paper 35-only adjustment was found.
results.recommendation: No action beyond retaining the one-external-constant boundary.

results.manuscript_claim: eta_late = 5.75e-10 from omega_b,geom + T_obs, DERIVED/SCOPED.
candidate_kappa_fields: choice not to use Omega_b = f_b Omega_m_active
results.verdict: DERIVED/SCOPED plus imported standard constants
results.evidence: paper35_eta_io_theorem_chain_report.md gives eta_IO,late = 5.741795864304530e-10 using proton mass and paper35_eta_io_gap_closure_report.md gives composition-corrected eta = 5.748778515173695e-10; dead projected-density route gives eta = 1.361668937436636e-09 and is explicitly killed.
results.recommendation: Add explicit wording that the calculation also imports standard particle/thermodynamic constants and a mean-baryon-mass convention.

results.manuscript_claim: BBN nuclear reactions see T_IO, not T_obs.
results.verdict: DERIVED/SCOPED
results.evidence: paper35_eta_bbn_temperature_assignment_report.md closes the temperature gate by observable typing: BBN rates are local bulk microphysics, while GTTP x^K_gauge is observer-side optical readout.
results.recommendation: No numerical action; preserve typed-observable language.

results.manuscript_claim: eta_BBN = 6.151e-10 agrees with Planck eta to 0.8% as cross-typed consistency.
results.verdict: DERIVED/SCOPED for IO eta_BBN; verified cross-typed comparison
results.evidence: eta_BBN = eta_obs x^(3 K_gauge), with x^(3 K_gauge) = 1.071240943860573; raw eta_BBN equals Planck eta is explicitly no-go.
results.recommendation: No hidden parameter; do not present the 0.8% agreement as a same-observable confrontation.

results.manuscript_claim: gamma_BI was not tuned to eta.
results.verdict: no-issue-found
results.evidence: A Paper 35-only variation of gamma_BI would break the shared-constant discipline and move many upstream predictions.
results.recommendation: No action.

results.manuscript_claim: IO supplies departure from equilibrium and structural chirality, but not a complete baryogenesis mechanism.
results.verdict: mixed: DERIVED/SCOPED for departure from equilibrium; CONDITIONAL/CONSTRUCTED for CP ingredient; no full mechanism
results.evidence: paper35_baryogenesis_from_chiral_boundary_report.md finds no theorem-grade baryon-number-violating operator and no internal chirality/sign selector.
results.recommendation: Avoid wording that implies full Sakharov closure.

results.manuscript_claim: A conditional source-era route gives g_chi = K_gauge^4, T_f = K_gauge^4 M_Pl,reduced, and eta_chiral = 7.04 K_gauge^8 = 5.787e-10.
results.verdict: CONDITIONAL/CONSTRUCTED
results.evidence: The route depends on a constructed freeze-out selector and external Poplawski map; current reports list freeze-out dynamics, baryon-separation operator, and chirality/sign selector as missing theorem objects.
results.recommendation: Replace independent-derivation language with conditional constructed source-era diagnostic.

results.manuscript_claim: The late-time eta target fixes epsilon1 kappa_f and Davidson-Ibarra floors.
results.verdict: DERIVED/CONDITIONAL on standard external leptogenesis class and Poplawski target slice
results.evidence: paper35_external_leptogenesis_target_theorem_report.md explicitly surfaces ADMITTED_EXTERNAL_CLASS, ADMITTED_EXTERNAL_MAP, and ADMITTED_SLICE.
results.recommendation: Surface external-class and slice conditionality wherever these numbers are quoted.

results.manuscript_claim: Casas-Ibarra source space remains positive-dimensional after imposing eta; residual dimension = 3 real.
results.verdict: DERIVED/CONDITIONAL on Casas-Ibarra hierarchical type-I source class
results.evidence: paper35_external_casas_ibarra_source_manifold_theorem_report.md proves non-uniqueness inside the admitted external class.
results.recommendation: No numerical action; keep external-class label visible.

results.manuscript_claim: Visible transfer closes to Weinberg operator; compatible UV completion is type-I neutrino portal; naive local thermal implementation is dead.
results.verdict: DERIVED/CONDITIONAL on current carrier and support-crossing slice
results.evidence: paper35_transfer_operator_class_theorem_report.md surfaces ADMITTED_CARRIER, ADMITTED_PORTAL_CLASS, and ADMITTED_SLICE.
results.recommendation: Add conditional-visibility wording around unique/dead claims.

results.manuscript_claim: Remaining internal debt reduces to charged transfer interaction generator V_tr.
results.verdict: DERIVED/CONDITIONAL on admitted carrier and portal class
results.evidence: Without V_tr, visible charge cannot be produced because d<Q_vis>/dt = i<[H0,Q_vis]> = 0; coefficient and rate theorem remain open.
results.recommendation: Surface carrier/portal conditionality.

results.manuscript_claim: Y_(B-L)^source = Q5 F(...); current-stack Q5 = 0 kills baryogenesis.
results.verdict: DERIVED/CONDITIONAL on Paper 32 extended fermionic/chiral carrier and current-stack no-extra-twist conditions
results.evidence: paper35_q5_topological_spectral_nogo_theorem_report.md proves zero index, zero eta-invariant, no chirality selector, no puncture twist, and no APS term on the admitted current carrier.
results.recommendation: Qualify Q5 = 0 as current-stack/admitted-carrier rigidity.

results.manuscript_claim: Every route to Q5 != 0 was investigated and killed at theorem grade.
results.verdict: mixed DERIVED, DERIVED/SCOPED, and DERIVED/CONDITIONAL
results.evidence: conditional audit shows several route kills are CLEAN while others are CONDITIONAL_VERIFIED on carrier, boundary-locality, or relative/singular inflow premises.
results.recommendation: Replace unqualified theorem-grade wording with current-stack scoped wording.

results.manuscript_claim: Obstruction reduces to spin-c residual n with current n = 0 and two exact future routes.
candidate_kappa_fields: map identifying surface and inflow routes
results.verdict: DERIVED/SCOPED current-stack frontier; partial DERIVED/CONDITIONAL inside relative/singular inflow extension
results.evidence: paper35_final_residual_irreducibility_theorem_report.md leaves disjoint residual pair; paper35_relative_inflow_induced_boundary_state_theorem_report.md compresses pair only inside admitted relative/singular inflow extension.
results.recommendation: State future route/frontier object, not existing derived mechanism.

results.manuscript_claim: Baryogenesis mechanism investigation consists of 30+ theorem-grade artifacts.
candidate_kappa_fields: theorem-grade label replaced by actual status registry
results.verdict: scope-creep
results.evidence: The current registry audits 48 theorem surfaces: 15 CLEAN and 33 CONDITIONAL_VERIFIED.
results.recommendation: Republication hygiene: replace with registry-accurate statement.

results.manuscript_claim: IO formation clock gives 46-48% more time at z > 10; JWST impossible galaxies are expected.
results.verdict: DERIVED/SCOPED timing relief; verified confrontation; not full galaxy-formation resolution
results.evidence: paper35_three_confrontations_report.md reproduces +46-48% timing relief and explicitly says the listed objects are not literally impossible from clock time alone.
results.recommendation: Reword abstract/body to timing-pressure relief rather than impossible-galaxy resolution.

results.manuscript_claim: Old w=-1/3 observer-side prediction is retired; active branch is w=-1 and gives chi2 = 69.48; IO does not predict DESI evolving dark energy.
results.verdict: DERIVED/SCOPED plus verified data confrontation
results.evidence: paper35_desi_dark_energy_investigation_report.md gives active branch chi2 = 69.484809, retired a^-2 carryover chi2 = 3343.470545, and flat CPL image w0 = -1.030263, wa = -0.111508.
results.recommendation: No structural action; preserve correction framing and do not use older w=-1/3 confrontation as the live conclusion.

results.manuscript_claim: The IO geometric alternative accounts for the gauge-coupled matter inventory without a dark matter particle; future direct-detection experiments will continue to find nothing.
results.verdict: scope-creep / label downgrade required
results.evidence: Paper 33 already frames the geometric dark-sector interpretation as not yet a derived no-particle theorem; a primitive typed dark-sector carrier remains conditionally open.
results.recommendation: Downgrade to CONDITIONAL FORECAST/geometric-DM sector. Do not state an unconditional no-particle theorem.

results.manuscript_claim: Four open problems are resolved or constrained by the same boundary-to-bulk projection.
results.verdict: scope correction recommended
results.evidence: Eta and DESI are strong; JWST is timing relief; baryogenesis mechanism is obstructed/reduced rather than derived; dark matter is a conditional forecast.
results.recommendation: Use addressed/constrained/reduced language instead of implying all four are solved at the same level.

results.manuscript_claim: Paper 35 contains no fitted cosmological parameters.
results.verdict: no hidden continuous fitted parameter found
results.evidence: The audit found external constants, standard-theory maps, admitted slices, and conditional extensions, but no silently introduced continuous scalar tuned to Paper 35 outputs.
results.recommendation: Keep zero-fitted-cosmological-parameters claim only with conditional/constructed/external labels visible.

action_summary.reason: Paper 35 v1.0 needs label/scope hygiene, especially around theorem-grade artifact count and dark-matter null forecast.
No audited numerical chain failed; issues are status and scope boundaries.
